project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 web application with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm static generation of all pages. Run `npm run lint` to confirm no lint errors.
environment_constraints: Open internet - can install npm packages freely. No Docker setup. No test runner installed.
contribution_requirements: Work on branch enhance/multipage-ui-navbar-fonts-filters. Commit changes with descriptive messages.
key_patterns:
- All pages use 'use client' directive with motion/react animations
- Layout in app/layout.tsx wraps all pages with Navbar and Footer
- CSS variables defined in app/globals.css with @theme inline for Tailwind v4
- Icons from lucide-react
- Styling uses custom CSS variables (--radius, --accent, --surface, etc.)
- Font: Geist Sans (body), Playfair Display (display headings)
- Dark mode via .dark class with CSS variable overrides
directory_structure:
app/ - Next.js app router directory
  components/ - Shared components (Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx)
  for-employees/ - page to be REMOVED
  for-students/ - page to be REMOVED
  post/ - Post opportunity page (keep)
  layout.tsx - Root layout with fonts and Navbar/Footer
  page.tsx - Main homepage (~500 lines) with hero, profile form, opportunities, how-it-works, webinars/certs
  globals.css - CSS variables and Tailwind theme
